name: Reid Wiseman
bio: Commander of Artemis II. Former chief of the NASA Astronaut Office. Flew on ISS Expedition 40/41 (2014). Naval test pilot and fighter pilot veteran.

name: Victor Glover
bio: Pilot. First Black astronaut assigned to a lunar mission. Flew on Crew Dragon Resilience to ISS (2020). Naval aviator with 3,000+ flight hours.

name: Christina Koch
bio: First woman assigned to a lunar mission. Record holder for longest single spaceflight by a woman — 328 days on ISS (2019–2020). Electrical engineer.

name: Jeremy Hansen
bio: First Canadian assigned to a lunar mission. CF-18 fighter pilot. Has not yet flown in space — Artemis II will be his first mission.
